Cross Pendant · Enamel Color Map

Derived from Album Artwork · God's Algorithm
Album Art · Color Zones
Album Art · Pattern Reading
① Crown Zone (upper 25%)
Purple #5849B4 concentrates here. Two adjacent tiles in upper center, deepening into navy at right edge.
② Teal Emergence (middle)
Teal #339B86 surfaces in the center column, flanked by dark teal and navy. Never appears on outer edges.
③ Left / Right Asymmetry
Left side reads calmer (steel blue). Right side skews darker (navy #2B3392). The arm tips are always the quietest.
④ Base Resolution
The composition settles back into steel blue #2F6DA2 at the bottom , grounding the jewel tones above.

Design Logic
Purple anchors the head. It feels like the rarest, most precious color, thus reading like a focal gem at the top. Teal wraps the waist. Navy deepens the lower body and right arm. Steel blue grounds the base and frames the arms just like the background field in the album art.

The cross doesn't copy the album artwork. It follows the same color grammar: jewel tones clustered at the center and top, dissolving outward and downward into the cool steel field.
